package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_writeheader_after_write: Handlers that write the response body before calling WriteHeader(...).
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario386Positive(url string) (*http.Response, error) {
	client := &http.Client{}
	return client.Get(url)
}
